nasb.text: It is a sign between Me and the sons of Israel forever; for in six days the Lord made heaven and earth, but on the seventh day He ceased from labor, and was refreshed.”

esv.text: It is a sign forever between me and the people of Israel that in six days the Lord made heaven and earth, and on the seventh day he rested and was refreshed.’”

cnv.text: 這是我和以色列人中間永遠的記號，因為六日之內耶和華創造了天地，但第七日就歇了工休息了。”

ccb.text: 这是我和以色列人之间永久的记号。耶和华用六天的时间创造天地万物，在第七天停工休息。”
